article_items.description: [HIGH] OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.
